hero.title: Where great coffee meets clean code.
hero.subtitle: A calm, creative coffee house for makers, students, and dreamers. Single-origin brews, blazing Wi‑Fi, and a space designed to help you focus.

about.title: A coffee house built for the curious.
about.body: KHode began as a late-night idea between a barista and a developer: a place where the warmth of Cambodian hospitality meets the focus of a great workspace. Every cup is brewed with intention, every corner designed for flow.
about.point1Body: Beans roasted in small batches and pulled to order by trained baristas.
about.point2Body: Fast Wi‑Fi, plentiful power, and quiet zones for deep work.
about.point3Body: Locally sourced, community-first, and proudly Cambodian.

menu.title: Crafted cups & kitchen bites
menu.subtitle: From bright single-origin pour-overs to comforting local plates — there's a brew for every build.

latte.name: Cloud Latte
latte.desc: Silky steamed milk over a balanced espresso base.

khmercoffee.name: Khmer Iced Coffee
khmercoffee.desc: Bold robusta with condensed milk over ice.

matcha.name: Matcha Forest
matcha.desc: Ceremonial matcha whisked with creamy oat milk.

coconut.name: Coconut Cooler
coconut.desc: Fresh coconut, lime, and a hint of mint.

croissant.name: Butter Croissant
croissant.desc: Flaky, golden, baked fresh every morning.

amok.name: Fish Amok Bowl
amok.desc: Cambodian classic with steamed jasmine rice.

features.title: More than a café — a place to make things.
features.subtitle: Thoughtful details that turn a coffee run into your most productive hour.

wifi.title: 500 Mbps Wi‑Fi
wifi.desc: Fiber-fast, reliable, and free for every guest.

power.title: Power at every seat
power.desc: Outlets and USB‑C within reach, always.

roast.title: Fresh daily roast
roast.desc: Beans roasted in-house, brewed within days.

quiet.title: Focus-friendly
quiet.desc: Quiet zones and ambient playlists for deep work.

pay.title: Scan & pay
pay.desc: Instant ABA KHQR checkout — no cash needed.

open.title: Open early, late
open.desc: From sunrise standups to midnight ship-its.

gallery.title: Step inside KHode
gallery.subtitle: Warm light, soft wood, and just the right amount of buzz.

order.title: Your order
order.empty: Your order is empty. Add something delicious!

auth.title: Welcome to KHode
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your phone to save orders & earn rewards.
auth.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms & Privacy Policy.
auth.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
auth.invalidOtp: That code doesn't look right. Try again.

payment.title: Pay with ABA KHQR
payment.subtitle: Scan the QR with any banking app to complete payment.
payment.scanHint: Open your banking app · Scan to pay · Tap once paid
payment.successBody: Thank you! Your order is being prepared.

contact.title: Come build with us
contact.subtitle: Find us in the heart of Siem Reap. Walk in, plug in, and stay a while.
contact.addressValue: #0097, Street 63, Wat Svay Village, Sangkat Sala Komrerk, Siem Reap, Cambodia

newsletter.title: Get the good stuff
newsletter.subtitle: New brews, events, and member perks — straight to your inbox.

footer.blurb: A code-inspired coffee house in Siem Reap. Brew. Build. Belong.
